---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis of Mobile Phone Specifications"
author: "TURRI ValentĂ­n"
date: "2025-04-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Global knitr options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Required libraries
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## 1. Data

```{r data, echo=TRUE}
# Define path and read CSV
path <- "C:/Users/valen/OneDrive/Escritorio/MaestrĂ­a en Ciencia de Datos/AID/TP2/Mobiles Dataset (2025).csv"
mobiles_data <- read_csv(path, locale = locale(encoding = "UTF-8"))
```

## 2. Data Cleaning and Standardization

```{r cleaning_and_standardization, echo=TRUE}
mobiles_data <- mobiles_data %>%
  mutate(
    `Mobile Weight [g]`      = as.numeric(str_remove(`Mobile Weight`, "g")),
    `Battery Capacity [mAh]` = as.numeric(str_remove_all(str_remove(`Battery Capacity`, "mAh"), ",")),
    `Launched Price [USD]`   = as.numeric(str_remove_all(str_remove(`Launched Price (USA)`, "USD"), ",")),
    `Back Camera MP1`        = as.numeric(str_extract(str_split_fixed(`Back Camera`, "\\+", 2)[,1], "\\d+(?=MP)")),
    `Back Camera MP2`        = as.numeric(str_extract(str_split_fixed(`Back Camera`, "\\+", 2)[,2], "\\d+(?=MP)")),
    `Front Camera MP`        = as.numeric(str_extract(str_split_fixed(`Front Camera`, "/", 2)[,1], "\\d+(?=MP)")),
    `Front Camera K`         = as.numeric(str_extract(str_split_fixed(`Front Camera`, "/", 2)[,2], "\\d+(?=K)"))
  ) %>%
  select(-`Mobile Weight`, -`Battery Capacity`, -`Launched Price (USA)`, -`Back Camera`, -`Front Camera`) %>%
  mutate(
    `Screen Size [inches]` = as.numeric(str_remove(`Screen Size`, "inches")),
    `RAM [GB]`             = as.numeric(str_remove(`RAM`, "GB"))
  ) %>%
  select(-`Screen Size`, -`RAM`)

kable(head(mobiles_data, 10),
      caption = "First 10 rows of the dataset with standardized columns")
```

## 3. Sample Size Calculation

```{r sample_size, echo=TRUE}
delta <- 100
sigma <- 175
alpha <- 0.01
beta  <- 0.01
power <- 1 - beta

z_alpha_2 <- qnorm(1 - alpha/2)
z_beta    <- qnorm(power)

n <- ((z_alpha_2 + z_beta) * sigma / delta)^2
n_rounded <- ceiling(n)

cat("Z critical values:\n",
    "Z_{1-Î±/2} =", round(z_alpha_2, 3), "\n",
    "Z_{1-Î˛} =", round(z_beta, 3), "\n",
    "Calculated sample size:", n, "\n",
    "Rounded sample size:", n_rounded)
```

## 4. Descriptive Statistics

```{r descriptive_statistics, echo=TRUE}
summary_stats <- mobiles_data %>%
  summarise(across(
    c(`Mobile Weight [g]`,
      `Battery Capacity [mAh]`,
      `Launched Price [USD]`,
      `Back Camera MP1`,
      `Back Camera MP2`,
      `Front Camera MP`,
      `Front Camera K`,
      `Screen Size [inches]`,
      `RAM [GB]`),
    list(
      mean   = ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      median = ~ median(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      min    = ~ min(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      max    = ~ max(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd     = ~ sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to = c("Variable", "Statistic"),
               names_sep = "_") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Statistic, values_from = value)

kable(summary_stats,
      caption = "Descriptive summary by variable",
      digits = 2)
```

## 5. Correlation Analysis (CORRECTED)

```{r correlation_significance, echo=TRUE}
# Remove NA values explicitly (robust fix)
filtered_data <- mobiles_data %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(`Launched Price [USD]`),
    !is.na(`RAM [GB]`)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    between(
      `Launched Price [USD]`,
      quantile(`Launched Price [USD]`, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      quantile(`Launched Price [USD]`, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    ),
    between(
      `RAM [GB]`,
      quantile(`RAM [GB]`, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      quantile(`RAM [GB]`, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )

# Scatter plot
ggplot(filtered_data, aes(x = `RAM [GB]`, y = `Launched Price [USD]`)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "#69b3a2", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship between RAM and Launch Price",
    x = "RAM [GB]",
    y = "Launch Price [USD]"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Pearson correlation test
pearson_test <- cor.test(
  filtered_data$`RAM [GB]`,
  filtered_data$`Launched Price [USD]`,
  method = "pearson"
)

kable(
  data.frame(
    Correlation = round(pearson_test$estimate, 3),
    p_value = format.pval(pearson_test$p.value, digits = 3)
  ),
  caption = "Pearson correlation between RAM and Launch Price"
)

"A weak but statistically significant positive correlation was found between RAM
and launch price. Although higher RAM is associated with higher prices, the
relationship is not strong, indicating that other factors play a more relevant role."
```

## 6. One-Sample t-Test

```{r t_test, echo=TRUE}
weights <- mobiles_data$`Mobile Weight [g]`

t_test_result <- t.test(weights, mu = 180, alternative = "greater")
print(t_test_result)

"The one-sample t-test indicates that the average mobile phone weight is
significantly greater than 180 grams (p < 0.001)."
```

## 7. Chi-Square Test of Independence

```{r chi_square, echo=TRUE}
median_battery <- median(mobiles_data$`Battery Capacity [mAh]`, na.rm = TRUE)

mobiles_data <- mobiles_data %>%
  mutate(
    High_Battery = factor(
      ifelse(`Battery Capacity [mAh]` >= median_battery, "High", "Low")
    ),
    Price_Category = cut(
      `Launched Price [USD]`,
      breaks = c(0, 500, 1000, Inf),
      labels = c("Low", "Mid", "Premium")
    )
  )

contingency <- table(mobiles_data$High_Battery, mobiles_data$Price_Category)
chisq.test(contingency)
```

## 8. Bootstrap for IQR Uncertainty

```{r bootstrap_iqr, echo=TRUE}
prices <- na.omit(mobiles_data$`Launched Price [USD]`)
iqr_original <- IQR(prices)

set.seed(123)
iqr_boot <- replicate(10000, IQR(sample(prices, replace = TRUE)))

quantile(iqr_boot, c(0.025, 0.975))
```

## 9. Average Euclidean Distances

```{r average_distances, echo=TRUE}
mean_distance <- function(x, y) {
  mean(as.matrix(dist(scale(cbind(x, y))))[
    lower.tri(matrix(0, length(x), length(x)))
  ])
}

distance_results <- data.frame(
  Pair = c("Back vs Front Camera",
           "Back Camera vs Weight",
           "Front Camera vs Weight"),
  Average_Distance = c(
    mean_distance(mobiles_data$`Back Camera MP1`,
                  mobiles_data$`Front Camera MP`),
    mean_distance(mobiles_data$`Back Camera MP1`,
                  mobiles_data$`Mobile Weight [g]`),
    mean_distance(mobiles_data$`Front Camera MP`,
                  mobiles_data$`Mobile Weight [g]`)
  )
)

kable(distance_results,
      caption = "Average Euclidean distances between variable pairs")
```
